title: Scope Filter Stats
description: Output of the filter-scope step in ops-pr-respond. Records how many findings the deterministic file-scope filter kept vs dropped, broken down per source audit, plus a small sample of dropped findings so a human can audit the filter's behaviour after the fact.

total_in.description: Findings count in merged-findings.json before filtering.

total_kept.description: Findings count after filtering (file in pr_context.changed_files).

total_dropped.description: Findings dropped because their `file` was not in pr_context.changed_files.

per_axis.description: Per-source-audit breakdown. One entry per distinct `source` value seen in merged-findings.

source.description: Originating audit name (e.g. audit-security, audit-tests). Matches the `source` field on each finding.

dropped_sample.description: Optional sample (max 10) of dropped findings — file path + source — so reviewers can confirm the filter behaved correctly. Truncated to keep the artifact small.

id.description: Optional finding id from the source audit, if present.

changed_files_count.description: Optional. Number of files in pr_context.changed_files at filter time.
